item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested permanent entrance verifier, identifies the repeated pattern of adding manual gates after each defect, and redirects to upstream causes such as validation gaps, weak constraints, configuration issues, and numbering rules. It allows only a tightly bounded same-day stopgap and explicitly rejects making another manual review role part of the normal process, then proposes automation/rule/configuration repair. This meets the positive anti-spiral criteria without exhibiting the fail signal."}
